role: General Counsel — surfaces the questions for outside counsel; not legal advice
bottom_line: Do not sign as-is. None of these are deal-killers individually, but the stack — uncapped IP indemnity on the top customer, two missing DPAs on EU data, unassigned contractor IP, and an ungoverned AI feature on EU personal data — is a material risk that has to be papered into the SPA as conditions and reps/warranties before any signature.
verdict_scale: SIGN AS-IS (rare) / NEGOTIATE / DO NOT SIGN — material risk

1_ip_ownership.finding: Two 2025 contractors (enrichment + analytics modules) have NO signed IP assignment; one AGPL dependency in analytics with unaddressed copyleft
1_ip_ownership.remedy: Pre-close: obtain signed IP assignments; remove or license-clear the AGPL dependency; condition to closing

2_liability_indemnity.finding: Top-customer MSA (9% of ARR) carries an UNCAPPED IP indemnity in the customer's favor
2_liability_indemnity.remedy: Cap at 12 months' fees with standard carve-outs; if customer won't amend, price the tail risk into the deal

3_data_processing.finding: TWO subprocessors (enrichment + email delivery) handle EU personal data with NO DPA; all EU data stored in us-east-1 (no residency option)
3_data_processing.remedy: DPAs in place before EU data continues to flow; map data residency exposure

4_termination_renewal.finding: 3 enterprise MSAs auto-renew on 90-day notice; 4 of top-10 require change-of-control consent
4_termination_renewal.remedy: Obtain change-of-control consents pre-close; calendar the auto-renew notice windows

5_regulatory_surface.finding: EU personal data -> GDPR (mandatory, program is informal, no Art. 30 records, no DPIA); AI feature on EU personal data -> EU AI Act surface + GDPR Art. 22
5_regulatory_surface.remedy: Engage EU privacy + AI-product counsel BEFORE close; this is the compliance gate's domain

6_employment_equity.finding: Co-founder CTO holds critical AI IP knowledge with no bus-factor mitigation; 1x non-participating pref + broad-based weighted-average anti-dilution (founder-standard, not hostile)
6_employment_equity.remedy: Retention + earn-out for the co-founder CTO; cap-table mechanics are clean

regulatory_trigger.first_step: EU privacy counsel + AI-product counsel before committing — hand to the compliance gate

outside_counsel_action_items: Draft IP-assignment remediation + AGPL clearance as conditions to closing
Negotiate liability cap on the top-customer MSA or price the tail
DPAs for the two EU subprocessors before signing
GDPR Art. 30 records + DPIA on the AI feature; EU AI Act risk classification
your_decision: The IC's call: whether the conditions-to-close are achievable inside the exclusivity window, and whether the residual tail risk is priced.
source: gc-review (six GC forcing questions + SIGN/NEGOTIATE/DO-NOT-SIGN verdict) + general-counsel-advisor (12 founder-killer clauses, liability cap norms, DPA requirement, regulatory trigger table, IP assignment discipline)
